review_findings_closed.finding: Repository context collection allowed source_dir outside the approved workspace root.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Resolved source_dir and workspace_root before collection and fail-closed when source_dir is not inside the approved workspace root.

review_findings_closed.finding: Approval Center used approval_id when calling mission approve/reject APIs.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Approve/reject now resolve the selected approval and call mission APIs with approval.mission_id.

review_findings_closed.finding: Receipt chain verification recomputed content hash without full EvidenceStore integrity verification.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Receipt chain verification now calls EvidenceStore.verify(receipt_id) and marks unverifiable receipts as gaps.

review_findings_closed.finding: Repository excerpts were only placed in HTTP metadata and might not be visible to the real model.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Bounded redacted repository context, including excerpts and context_hash, is now added as a model-visible user message while retaining metadata binding.

review_findings_closed.finding: fetchTools returned a hardcoded empty array.
review_findings_closed.resolution: fetchTools now calls the real backend mission tool invocation endpoint.

review_findings_closed.finding: Memory evidence binding only checked source_evidence_id was non-empty.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Memory binding now verifies evidence existence, same mission ownership, and EvidenceStore integrity when available.

review_findings_closed.finding: FastAPI silently fell back to the legacy UI when the dashboard build was missing.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Console route is only mounted when the Next static export exists; no silent legacy fallback is served.

review_findings_closed.finding: Unknown tools raised before failed invocation and receipt generation.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Unknown tools now enter deterministic failed invocation recording, receive TOOL_UNKNOWN, and emit a receipt before re-raising.

duplicate_threads.finding: EvidenceStore receipt-chain finding appeared twice in Codex review threads.
duplicate_threads.handling: Single code fix applied in src/nexara_prime/evidence.py; duplicate thread has the same remediation target.
